_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: Results can be generated only from OMR imports with status approved_for_results.
Only approved OMR candidate scores can produce results.
Result scores must come from OMR candidate scores or audited recalculation workflow.
Only one active result per student/olympiad/result_version.
percentage = total_score / max_score * 100, rounded by configured precision.
Result publication blocked until ranks are generated when ranking is enabled.
Result approval and correction require reason/approval note.
Withheld/revoked/superseded results are not eligible for certificates.
School result view derives school_id from session and returns only own published results.
Public result lookup is disabled unless separately approved.
